name: Big Sky Tennis/Pickleball Courts
description: Big Sky Tennis/Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gallatin Gateway, MT. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Bogert Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bogert Park in Bozeman, MT! There are 7 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Bozeman Classic Pickleball Club
description: Bozeman Classic is Bozeman's indoor Pickleball Club with 4 full size (60' x 30') dedicated pickleball courts featuring outdoor grade court playing surface, permanent Putterman nets and posts, and a pro shop.  We are in Bozeman's hot NorthEast nieghborhood on E Peach St. between Wild Crumb and Mountains Walking Brewery.  We have 40 parking spots and are open daily from 5am-11pm for reservations.  A limited number of unlimited memberships are still available.
open_play_schedule: 1.5 Hour Reservation slots every day starting at 5:30AM
fees: Members only — Unlimited Memberships are for sale, limited to 395 total members.  Drop in guests can book courts up to 3 days in advance for $11/hr per player

name: Gallatin Elite Soccer Club Sports Facility
description: The Gallatin Elite Soccer Club has a pickleball court available for private rentals.
fees: Private — You set up a membership on the web site, which is free.  Then you reserve by the hour.

name: Gallatin Valley YMCA
description: Gallatin Valley YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Bozeman, MT. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Ophir Elementary School in Big Sky
description: Come play pickleball at Ophir Elementary School in Big Sky in Gallatin Gateway, MT! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Ridge Athletic Club
description: Ridge Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Bozeman, MT. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, food, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Riverside Country Club
description: Riverside Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Bozeman, MT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Southside Park Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Southside Park Tennis Courts in Bozeman, MT! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.
